data.name: Between Her Toes
data.detailed_description:
你是否曾幻想过，一个高大无比的女人彻底支配你？如果你小得连她的脚趾都不如大……而她非常清楚如何利用这一点来为所欲为呢？



走进一个超现实又火辣的微缩幻想世界，体验权力彻底颠倒的快感。认识一下克洛伊（Chloe）——一位身姿高挑、魅惑迷人的巨人女性，带着狡黠的微笑，最喜欢把男人变成她顺从的小玩具。她不仅喜欢掌控……她享受其中。



这部视觉小说包含两个令人难忘的故事，深入探索尺寸幻想中的性感场景——从挑逗与折磨，到彻底屈服。无论你渴望被温柔戏弄，还是被无情征服，克洛伊都准备好帮你实现幻想……但必须按照她的规则。


游戏特色：
👣 独特而刺激的尺寸幻想剧情
🎙️ 全程角色语音，情欲体验更真实
🔍 缩放模式，让你近距离欣赏每一个诱人细节
🔥 数十个充满想象力的露骨场景，满足你的微缩癖幻想



幻想要谨慎……克洛伊可能真的会让它成真。而一旦你落入她的脚趾之间……就再也回不去了。

data.short_description: 你曾是她的室友。现在？你是她的脚宠。哎呀。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 土耳其文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4000
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6 or Later
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Between Her Toes
data.detailed_description:
Have you ever fantasized about a towering woman dominating you completely? What if you were no bigger than her toe… and she knew exactly how to use that to her advantage?

Step into a surreal and steamy world of size-play and submission, where you shrink down and experience the ultimate power dynamic shift. Meet Chloe — a statuesque, seductive giantess with a wicked smile and a love for turning men into her obedient little toys. She doesn’t just dominate… she enjoys it.

This visual novel features two unforgettable stories that dive deep into erotic size-fantasy scenarios — from teasing and torment to total surrender. Whether you dream of being gently toyed with or ruthlessly used, Chloe is ready to make that fantasy come true… on her terms.

Features:
👣 A unique and provocative size-fantasy storyline
🎙️ Fully voiced characters who bring the seduction to life
🔍 Zoom mode for exploring every delicious detail up close
🔥 Dozens of explicit and imaginative scenes to satisfy your inner size-kink

Be careful what you fantasize about — Chloe might just make it come true. And once you're between her toes… there's no going back.

data.short_description: You used to be her roommate. Now you’re her foot pet. Oops.
data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Indonesian, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
